forkee.name: ai-job-search
forkee.description: AI-powered job application framework built on Claude Code. Fork it, fill in your profile, and let Claude evaluate jobs, tailor CVs, write cover letters, and prepare you for interviews.

forkee.name: compresso
forkee.description: Convert any video/image into a tiny size. 100% free & open-source. Available for Mac, Windows & Linux.

forkee.name: voice-pro
forkee.description: Gradio WebUI for creators and developers, featuring key TTS (Edge-TTS, kokoro) and zero-shot Voice Cloning (E2 & F5-TTS, CosyVoice), with Whisper audio processing, YouTube download, Demucs vocal isolation, and multilingual translation.

forkee.name: free-llm-api-keys
forkee.description: Free LLM API keys for GPT-5.4, Claude, DeepSeek, Gemini, Grok — copy, paste, use. Updated 3-5x daily. No credit card needed.

forkee.name: pentest-ai
forkee.description: Offensive-security MCP server with 205 wrapped tools, 17 specialist agents, and 60 SPA-aware probes for OWASP Top 10. CLI + MCP, BYO LLM. No API key needed on MCP path.
